name: Torrey Pines South
address: 11480 N Torrey Pines Rd, La Jolla, CA 92037
designer: William F. Bell (1957); redesigned by Rees Jones (2001, 2019)
green_fee_notes: 2026 city rates: San Diego residents $73 weekday / $90 weekend for 18 holes, non-residents $258 weekday / $322 weekend, plus a non-refundable advance booking fee of $32 (resident) or $50 (non-resident).
notable: Hosted the 2008 U.S. Open (Tiger Woods beat Rocco Mediate in a 19-hole playoff) and the 2021 U.S. Open (Jon Rahm)
Annual host of the PGA Tour's Farmers Insurance Open
At 7,802 yards from the Black tees, the longest course played in a regular PGA Tour event
Hosted the 2025 Genesis Invitational after it was relocated due to the Los Angeles wildfires

confidence.tees: Men's ratings confirmed by the official scorecard PDF (11-24-2020 printing) and SCGA WHS charts; Yellow men's rating from SCGA chart only.
confidence.holes: Per-hole yardages, par, and handicap rows from the official scorecard; tournament setups vary slightly.
confidence.lat_lng: Coordinates are for the overall facility, not a South-specific centroid.
confidence.year_opened: 1957 is the opening of the 36-hole facility; Rees Jones redesigned the South in 2001 with further work in 2019.
